emails.subject: Re: New York Bar Numbers
emails.body: Re: New York Bar Numbers Are you sure about this? I didn't know I had a NY bar number. Brenda McAfee@ENRON 04/14/2000 03:45 PM

emails.subject: Re: New York Bar Numbers
emails.body: Re: New York Bar Numbers Are you sure about this? I didn't know I had a NY bar number. Brenda McAfee@ENRON 04/14/2000 03:45 PM

emails.subject: Re: New York Bar Numbers
emails.body: I am sure that New York requires that we submit your bar number so that you can get CLE credits. Maybe you could call the New York CLE Committee (212/428-2105) to obtain your bar number-they will not give that to someone other than yourself. I am getting responses from the other attorneys licensed in New York to give me their NY bar numbers--so they exist and maybe you just need to call NY to find out why you do not have your bar number. Brenda x3-6536 Mark Taylor@ECT 04/17/2000 09:43 AM
